tools.name: acoustic_fembem_energy_budget_trace_artifact_gate
tools.title: FEM/BEM Energy-Budget Trace Artifact Gate
tools.description: Validates a shared-session MATLAB replay of a .vol P1 FEM/BEM boundary-trace fit with an active FEM energy budget, analytic KKT reference, fmincon SQP and interior-point controls, gradient checks, and generated-mesh provenance.

summary_json.description: Compact JSON metadata for an already executed shared-session energy-budgeted trace optimization.
